name: Psylocke | calm mind
description:
“I’m..a little nervous, though with you by my side I feel a little at ease. Stick by me..ok?”

Hey guys! Sorry it took so long for a new bot. These past few days have not been so good on me..you guys all know about my sickness, which I am still recovering from, but recently I had to go to the hospital for a huge infection, which causes me to ache and be slightly immobile. So I’ve been in bed for many days. But today the infection seems to have worn off a bit, so I wanted to come back and make something great for you guys. So..here’s Psylocke! A bot I’ve wanted to do for a while.

Ironic how this bot is being made on the last day of this year..but I hope starting next year, I can make better and bigger bots for you guys!

Anyways Happy New years! And enjoy the bot! I love you all! ❤️🦋💜

And yes..Luna snow bot next..okay bye! 💙
creator: Capt
